speaker: speaker1
text: How do you spend your day , Helen ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , on weekdays I get up around ten . Then I read the paper for an hour and have lunch at about noon .

speaker: speaker1
text: Really ? What time do you go to work ?

speaker: speaker1
text: And when do you get home at night ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I get home pretty late , around midnight .

speaker: speaker1
text: So what do you do , exactly ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm a TV announcer . Don't you recognize me ? I do the weather report on KNT !

speaker: speaker1
text: Gee , I'm sorry . I don't watch TV .
